title: Christoffel
summary: Records the Christoffel-symbol components associated with the straight ambient normal form.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Records the Christoffel-symbol components associated with the straight ambient normal form.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/FG/Christoffel.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Component data needed for normal-form Christoffel symbols. Its mathematical data are: d Rho G: ι maps to ι maps to the real numbers; base Gamma: ι maps to ι maps to ι maps to the real numbers.
correspondence.leanType: structure ChristoffelComponents (ι : Type w) extends NormalInverseMetricComponents ι
def baseDelta [DecidableEq ι] (i j : ι) : ℝ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For i of type ι, base Delta i i equals 1.
correspondence.leanType: theorem baseDelta_self [DecidableEq ι] (i : ι) : baseDelta i i = 1

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Raised-index Christoffel symbols in straight normal form. In explicit terms, for c of type christoffel components ι, its defining expression is | Ambient Index.zero, Ambient Index.base i, Ambient Index.base j maps to -1 divided by 2 times C.t times C.d Rho G i j | Ambient Index.base k, Ambient Index.zero, Ambient Index.base j maps to C.t⁻¹ times base Delta j k | Ambient Index.base k, Ambient Index.base j, Ambient Index.zero maps to C.t⁻¹ times base Delta j k | Ambient Index.inf, Ambient Index.base i, Ambient Index.base j maps to -C.g i j plus C.rho times C.d Rho G i j | Ambient Index.base k, Ambient Index.base i, Ambient Index.base j maps to C.base Gamma k i j |,, maps to 0.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \begin{aligned}\operatorname{christoffelComp}(\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero}, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j)&=-1 / 2 \cdot t_{\mathrm{C}} \cdot C.\operatorname{dRhoG} i j\\\operatorname{christoffelComp}(\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} k, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero}, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j)&=t_{\mathrm{C}}⁻¹ \cdot \operatorname{baseDelta} j k\\\operatorname{christoffelComp}(\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} k, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero})&=t_{\mathrm{C}}⁻¹ \cdot \operatorname{baseDelta} j k\\\operatorname{christoffelComp}(\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{inf}, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j)&=-g_{\mathrm{C}} i j + C.\operatorname{rho} \cdot C.\operatorname{dRhoG} i j\\\operatorname{christoffelComp}(\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} k, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i, \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j)&=C.\operatorname{baseGamma} k i j\\\operatorname{christoffelComp}(_, _, _)&=0\end{aligned}
correspondence.leanType: def christoffelComp [DecidableEq ι] (C : ChristoffelComponents ι) : AmbientIndex ι → AmbientIndex ι → AmbientIndex ι → ℝ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Christoffel Components ι, and i, j of type ι, christoffel Comp C Ambient Index.zero Ambient Index.base i Ambient Index.base j equals -1 divided by 2 times C.t times C.d Rho G i j.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{DecidableEq} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{ChristoffelComponents} ι,\;i,j\colon ι,\quad \operatorname{christoffelComp} C \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j) = -1 / 2 \cdot t_{\mathrm{C}} \cdot C.\operatorname{dRhoG} i j
correspondence.leanType: theorem christoffel_zero_base_base [DecidableEq ι] (C : ChristoffelComponents ι) (i j : ι) : christoffelComp C AmbientIndex.zero (AmbientIndex.base i) (AmbientIndex.base j) = -(1 / 2 : ℝ) * C.t * C.dRhoG i j

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Christoffel Components ι, and k, j of type ι, christoffel Comp C Ambient Index.base k Ambient Index.zero Ambient Index.base j equals C.t⁻¹ times base Delta j k.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{DecidableEq} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{ChristoffelComponents} ι,\;k,j\colon ι,\quad \operatorname{christoffelComp} C (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} k) \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j) = t_{\mathrm{C}}⁻¹ \cdot \operatorname{baseDelta} j k
correspondence.leanType: theorem christoffel_base_zero_base [DecidableEq ι] (C : ChristoffelComponents ι) (k j : ι) : christoffelComp C (AmbientIndex.base k) AmbientIndex.zero (AmbientIndex.base j) = C.t⁻¹ * baseDelta j k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Christoffel Components ι, and k, j of type ι, christoffel Comp C Ambient Index.base k Ambient Index.base j Ambient Index.zero equals C.t⁻¹ times base Delta j k.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{DecidableEq} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{ChristoffelComponents} ι,\;k,j\colon ι,\quad \operatorname{christoffelComp} C (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} k) (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j) \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{zero} = t_{\mathrm{C}}⁻¹ \cdot \operatorname{baseDelta} j k
correspondence.leanType: theorem christoffel_base_base_zero [DecidableEq ι] (C : ChristoffelComponents ι) (k j : ι) : christoffelComp C (AmbientIndex.base k) (AmbientIndex.base j) AmbientIndex.zero = C.t⁻¹ * baseDelta j k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Christoffel Components ι, and i, j of type ι, christoffel Comp C Ambient Index.inf Ambient Index.base i Ambient Index.base j equals -C.g i j plus C.rho times C.d Rho G i j.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{DecidableEq} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{ChristoffelComponents} ι,\;i,j\colon ι,\quad \operatorname{christoffelComp} C \operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{inf} (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j) = -g_{\mathrm{C}} i j + C.\operatorname{rho} \cdot C.\operatorname{dRhoG} i j
correspondence.leanType: theorem christoffel_inf_base_base [DecidableEq ι] (C : ChristoffelComponents ι) (i j : ι) : christoffelComp C AmbientIndex.inf (AmbientIndex.base i) (AmbientIndex.base j) = -C.g i j + C.rho * C.dRhoG i j

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For C of type Christoffel Components ι, and k, i, j of type ι, christoffel Comp C Ambient Index.base k Ambient Index.base i Ambient Index.base j equals C.base Gamma k i j.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,\operatorname{DecidableEq} ι,\;C\colon \operatorname{ChristoffelComponents} ι,\;k,i,j\colon ι,\quad \operatorname{christoffelComp} C (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} k) (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} i) (\operatorname{AmbientIndex}.\operatorname{base} j) = C.\operatorname{baseGamma} k i j
correspondence.leanType: theorem christoffel_base_base_base [DecidableEq ι] (C : ChristoffelComponents ι) (k i j : ι) : christoffelComp C (AmbientIndex.base k) (AmbientIndex.base i) (AmbientIndex.base j) = C.baseGamma k i j

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
